ideals: I addressed challenges with manipulation, influence, or planning
I expressed my heritage, background, or beliefs through my actions
Despite my best efforts, we went wildly off plan
system.secondWind: You can regain all effort when another team mate becomes exhausted or breaks.

specialAbility.name: Special Ability
specialAbility.effect: When you become exhausted or break, all team mates regain 1 effort.

powers.name: Contingency
powers.description: 2/session - Flash back to tell the GM how you prepared. Make a fortune roll: 4+ gain expected effect, 6 choose an extra effect, 1-3 no effect (regain 1 use).

powers.name: Swoon
powers.description: 1/session - When you would take consequences, have a willing nearby character take them instead. They take 1 xp.

powers.name: Immaculate
powers.description: Get a knack for situations where being dressed appropriately would help (disguises, uniforms, formalwear, etc).

powers.name: Beg, Borrow, or Steal
powers.description: When you need the right tool, you have it. Power depends on chapter. Gain +1d using the tool. GM chooses a downside.

powers.name: Fruitful
powers.description: You have a contact or family member in every populated location. Roll +1d on actions where they could help.

powers.name: Faust
powers.description: 1/session - Next roll, treat all 1s as 6s. The roll after that, treat all 6s as 1s.

powers.name: Make It Work
powers.description: 1/session - Use your highest rated action for any single action with normal effectiveness. Explain how. At chapter III, no explanation needed.

powers.name: Coordinator
powers.description: Get 2 xp for pursuing a group ambition instead of 1, and gain +1d on group ambitions.

powers.name: Ladder Climber
powers.description: You can pursue ambitions twice during an interlude, but only different ambitions.

powers.name: Golden Hand
powers.description: 1/session - Increase the effect of your next Command action to superpowered.

powers.name: Gambit of the Weeper
powers.description: Take a power from another Bond.

gearKits.name: Adventurer's Kit
items: Lantern, pack, bedroll, rope, flint and tinder, journal, rations, cooking pot, knife, canvas tent

gearKits.name: Shady Kit
items: False identity papers, tilted hat, quick disguise, coat with six hidden pockets, lock picks, forgery tools, convenient bribe, arkentech skeleton key

gearKits.name: Socialite's Kit
items: Two fancy outfits, one very fancy outfit, one inconspicuous outfit, one servant's outfit, nice shoes, jewelry, tailoring supplies, invite to any party

gearKits.name: Boss's Kit
items: Ledger, gambling kit, crowbar, flask, guild membership badge, key to a warehouse, scuffed pair of arkentech radios
